\tzpentry{ID3438}{Phase Angle Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3438 introduces Phase Angle Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$ \theta_i = \arccos(1 - \frac{2i}{N}), \quad \phi_i = i\gamma $$
